blocks.content: She didn't say anything at first. Just — breathing. He could hear that she'd been crying.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Hey.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You went home.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You told me you were staying in LA.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I was working on a project.
A sound came out of her that was half-laugh, half-cry. He held it.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: My mom.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She didn't know what she was going to say until she said it. I just pointed the camera.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Savannah was in socks.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She didn't give me time to warn her.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Your mom —
Her voice caught.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit. What she said about your dad.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I left it in on purpose. I wanted you to have it.
She was quiet for a moment. He could hear her working through it — taking the pieces and turning them over, the way she always did.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: The field.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You went there at night. Alone.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Eli was there. Technically.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit Jenkins.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Daisy Jones.
He heard her breath come in.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yes.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yes. Obviously. Did you really think —

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I didn't think anything. I just needed to hear you say it.
She laughed through the crying. He sat on the edge of his bed with his head in his hand.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: How long have you been planning this.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Since before July.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Before the field.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I knew what I wanted to ask you. I just needed to figure out how to ask it in a way that was worth the question.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: It was worth it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Good.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I'm going to need a ring though.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I have one. I've had it since September.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I told you I was planning.
She laughed again, and he laughed with her, and they stayed on the phone for two hours.
